meta.name: trap_prep
meta.description: Generates a comprehensive guide for creating and running traps in a tabletop RPG, including component tables, a number matrix, and sample traps.

inputs.name: theme
inputs.label: Trap Theme
inputs.description: An optional theme to apply consistently to the generated traps, e.g., 'ancient temple', 'steampunk dungeon'.

outputs.name: guide_content
outputs.label: Trap Generation Guide
outputs.description: The full markdown content for the 'trap_generator_and_runner.md' file, containing tables, matrices, generated traps, and GM advice.
